title: ornithopus sativus subsp. isthmocarpus
intro: Ornithopus sativus subsp. isthmocarpus, also known as the 'white bird's foot trefoil', is a sub-species of the Ornithopus sativus plant, which is a type of legume native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Ornithopus sativus subsp. isthmocarpus can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
